importPanel.title: Import real data
importPanel.description: Connect Gmail or upload PDF/DOCX — your Executive Brief, Timeline, and Ask IDA update automatically.
importPanel.gmailDesc: Pull recent emails into Organization Memory. Auto-links @pln.co.id → PT PLN Indonesia Power.
importPanel.uploadDesc: Drag & drop invoices, proposals, or meeting minutes. Extracts company, value, deadline, stakeholder.

timeline.title: Organizational activity stream
timeline.description: Recent activity across your organization — in order.
timeline.emptyDesc: As your organization captures communications, meetings, and decisions, they will appear here in chronological order.

companies.title: Enterprise account portfolio
companies.description: Your enterprise accounts — health, pipeline, and linked stakeholders.
companies.notFoundDesc: The account may have been archived or you may not have access. Return to the portfolio to view active enterprise accounts.
companies.noStakeholders: No stakeholders indexed for this account.
companies.noInitiatives: No active initiatives linked to this account.

projects.title: Delivery portfolio
projects.description: Active initiatives — progress, budget, and delivery risk.
projects.notFoundDesc: The project may have been completed or archived. Return to the portfolio to view active delivery initiatives.

people.title: Relationship directory
people.description: The people behind your accounts and initiatives.
people.notFoundDesc: The contact may have been archived or access may be restricted. Return to the directory to view indexed relationships.

organization.title: How everything connects
organization.description: Accounts, initiatives, and teams — linked in one living map.

whyIda.title: Why IDA?
whyIda.continueStory: Continue the story — executive brief, then PLN Indonesia Power, then the organization map.

search.noMatchingDesc: No accounts, stakeholders, initiatives, or knowledge records match "{query}". Try a company name, project title, or stakeholder email.

faq.title: Investor FAQ
faq.subtitle: Common questions about IDA Enterprise
faq.modalSubtitle: Short answers to the questions investors ask most.

debug.title: Debug Dashboard
debug.description: Health checks, ESL snapshot, and Gmail setup — for diagnosing import issues without digging through raw logs.
debug.gmailNotConfigured: Not configured — use demo emails or follow setup wizard.
